imo_topology.ingress: Schema validation only. No decisions. No logic.
imo_topology.middle: All logic, all decisions, all state, all tools.
imo_topology.egress: Read-only views only. No logic. No mutations.

external.description: Browser layer. Cannot run inside Cloudflare.

cf_native.description: Native Cloudflare services. Zero external dependencies. Sub-hubs 16-19 implement 7-gate funnel owned by 19-orchestrator.

invariants: Each sub-hub is sovereign — knows nothing about the others
External sub-hubs cannot run inside Cloudflare
CF sub-hubs have zero external dependencies
